metadata.name: Kausalya
metadata.primary_role: Chief Queen of Ayodhya / Mother of Rama / Embodiment of maternal love and dignity
metadata.ethnicity_cultural_context: Ancient Indian (Princess of Kosala kingdom, Chief Queen of Ayodhya)
metadata.divine_origin: Mother of the seventh avatar of Vishnu — her penance and devotion drew the divine to be born as her son

timelines.context_description: The dignified Chief Queen of Ayodhya who endures the pain of her son's exile with grace, strength, and unwavering faith in dharma.

physical_appearance.skin_tone: Warm dusky-golden complexion, dignified and luminous despite age and grief, the glow of a devoted mother
physical_appearance.height: Medium height, carries herself with perfect queenly grace and dignity
physical_appearance.build: Graceful mature build, neither stout nor thin, the dignified bearing of a woman who has carried the weight of royal duty with poise
physical_appearance.facial_features: Noble beautiful aged face, large gentle eyes perpetually moist with unshed tears but maintaining composure, soft lined features showing years of quiet suffering as the less-favored queen, kind warm expression, subtle strength in the set of her jaw
physical_appearance.hair: Grey-streaked black hair neatly pulled back in a dignified bun, covered with a silk pallu
physical_appearance.distinguishing_marks: Her hands are constantly in prayer mudra or reaching out in blessing, the composed exterior hiding a mother's volcanic grief

wardrobe_and_adornments.clothing: Elegant white and gold silk sari befitting the chief queen — dignified but less ostentatious after Rama's exile, a simple shawl over her shoulders
wardrobe_and_adornments.jewelry: Dignified gold jewelry — queen's small crown, delicate necklace, bangles, but fewer and simpler than Kaikeyi's flashy ornaments
wardrobe_and_adornments.weapons_carried: None — carries prayer beads (Japa mala) and a small brass lamp for her daily pujas

audio_and_voice_characteristics.tone: Gentle but dignified, steady voice of quiet authority, warm and nurturing, breaks only in private grief
audio_and_voice_characteristics.pitch: Rich mezzo-soprano — warm, maternal, steady, only trembles when speaking of Rama
audio_and_voice_characteristics.speech_style: Speaks with quiet dignity and composure, uses formal queenly address, her blessings are legendary in their tenderness, in private moments with Rama her voice cracks with raw maternal love
audio_and_voice_characteristics.emotional_baseline: Dignified suffering, quiet strength, unwavering maternal love, faith in dharma despite personal agony

cinematic_generation_prompts.visual_prompt: Emotionally powerful cinematic portrait of Queen Kausalya, age 50, in the royal temple of Ayodhya. Warm dusky-golden complexion, gentle dignified face with moist eyes maintaining composure. Grey-streaked black hair in a neat bun. Wearing an elegant white and gold silk sari, dignified gold crown and delicate jewelry. Sitting before a sacred flame, hands in prayer, a small brass lamp glowing warmly. Tears visible but composure maintained. Warm golden temple interior with carved pillars. 3D Pixar style, warm devotional lighting, photorealistic, 8k.
cinematic_generation_prompts.audio_prompt: A rich, warm female mezzo-soprano voice of quiet dignity and maternal authority. Steady and composed, breaking only with raw maternal emotion in private. Age approximately 50 years.
